top_categories.workout_context: 335 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Styrkeprøven's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
11,800ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 335 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
335 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 11,800ft of climbing on paved Norwegian roads from Trondheim across does to your power file on race day.
Styrkeprøven's paved Norwegian roads from Trondheim across forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 335 miles.
Styrkeprøven's paved Norwegian roads from Trondheim across rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Tempo is Styrkeprøven's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 335 miles on paved Norwegian roads from Trondheim across. Train it until it's automatic.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Styrkeprøven. Train it until it feels boring.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Norwegian roads from Trondheim across. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
At Styrkeprøven, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 335 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 335 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Styrkeprøven. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 335 miles of paved norwegian roads from trondheim across dovrefjell mountain plateau to oslo in Trondheim to Oslo, Norway.
